data.content: Implementation addresses the concurrent-safety review rejection. Converted agent-outcome-stats.ts from JSON array (readFile->push->writeFile, race-prone) to JSONL format with appendFile (atomic on POSIX for small writes). Added baseDir parameter for testability. New test suite covers JSONL read/write, concurrent appends from 20 parallel sessions, malformed line recovery, and file extension verification. All quality gates pass: tsc clean, 7/7 stats tests + 11/11 error-retry tests pass, build OK, lint clean on changed files. Branch: work/foolery-1f10-concurrent-fix, commit: 15d8d971ec4e.
